revision.text:
{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Vajrayana | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center; border-top:4px solid #000066; border-bottom:4px solid #000066; | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = text-align:center; background-color:#FFD068; border: 2px solid #FFD068 | liststyle = background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | class = hlist | image = [[File:Faith Buddhism Vajra.svg|100px|link=Vajra|Vajra]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Vajrayana|a series]] on | title = [[Vajrayana|{{color|#000066|Vajrayana Buddhism}}]]
| list1title = Traditions | list1 =
'''Historical traditions:''' * Ari-Acharya ** [[Ari Buddhism|Burmese-Bengal]] † ** [[Azhaliism|Yunnan]]
* [[Indonesian Esoteric Buddhism]] † * [[Philippine Esoteric Buddhism|Filipino Esoteric Buddhism]] †
*East Asian ** [[Chinese Esoteric Buddhism|Chinese]] ** [[Shingon Buddhism|Japanese]]
* [[Newar Buddhism|Nepalese]]
*[[Tibetan Buddhism|Inner Asian]] ** [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] ** Altaic ([[Religion_in_Inner_Mongolia#Buddhism|o]], [[Buddhism in Mongolia|x]], [[Buddhism in Russia|b, t, k]], [[Yugur#Buddhism|y]])
'''New branches:'''
* [[Gateway of the Hidden Flower]]
* [[New Kadampa Tradition|New Kadampa Buddhism]]
* [[Shambhala Buddhism]]
* [[True Awakening Tradition]]
| list2title = History | list2 =
* [[Tantra|Tantrism]]
* [[Mahasiddha]]
* [[Sahaja]]
| list3title = Key figures | list3 =
| list4title = Pursuit | list4 =
* [[Buddhahood]] * [[Bodhisattva]]
* [[Kalachakra]]
| list5title = Practices | list5 =
* [[Generation stage]] * [[Completion stage]]
* [[Phowa]] * [[Tukdam]]
'''[[Tantra techniques (Vajrayana)|Tantric techniques]]:'''
<small>'''Fourfold division:'''</small>
* [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Kriyā|Kriyayoga]]
* [[Charyayoga]]
* [[Yogatantra]]
* [[Anuttarayogatantra]]
<small>'''Twofold division:'''</small>
* [[Inner Tantras]]
* [[Outer Tantras]]
'''Thought forms and visualisation:'''
* [[Mandala]]
* [[Mantra]]
* [[Mudra]]
* [[Thangka]]
* [[Yantra]]
'''[[Yoga]]:'''
* [[Ngöndro|Ngöndro]]
* [[Guru yoga|Guru yoga]]
* [[Deity yoga|Deity yoga]]
* [[Six Dharmas of Naropa|Six yogas]]:
* [[Tummo|Inner heat]]
* [[Luminosity (Vajrayana)|Luminosity yoga]]
* [[Dream yoga|Dream yoga]]
* [[Bardo|Death yoga]]
* [[Karmamudrā|Sex yoga]]
| list6title = Festivals | list6 =
* [[Ganachakra]] * [[Ghost Festival|Ullambana Puja]] | list7title = Tantric texts | list7 =
* [[Anuttarayoga Tantra]]
* [[Cakrasaṃvara Tantra]]
* [[Guhyagarbha Tantra]]
* [[Kulayarāja Tantra]]
* [[Mahāmāyā Tantra]]
* [[Mañjuśrī-mūla-kalpa]]
* [[Mañjuśrīnāmasamgīti]]
* [[Tattvasaṃgraha Tantra]]
* [[Vajrasekhara Sutra]]
* [[Yuthok Nyingthig]]
| list8title = Symbols and tools | list8 =
* [[Damaru]] * [[Ghanta]] * [[Melong]]
* [[Phurba]] * [[Vajra]] * [[Yab-Yum]]
| list9title = Ordination and transmission | list9 =
* [[Esoteric transmission]]
* [[Pointing-out instruction]]
* [[Samaya]] * [[Vajracharya]]
| below = }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content = [[Category:Buddhism sidebar templates‎|Vajrayana]] }}</noinclude>

{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Vajrayana | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center; border-top:4px solid #000066; border-bottom:4px solid #000066; | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = text-align:center; background-color:#FFD068; border: 2px solid #FFD068 | liststyle = background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | class = hlist | image = [[File:Faith Buddhism Vajra.svg|100px|link=Vajra|Vajra]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Vajrayana|a series]] on | title = [[Vajrayana|{{color|#000066|Vajrayana Buddhism}}]]
| list1title = Traditions | list1 =

* [[Indonesian Esoteric Buddhism]] † * [[Philippine Esoteric Buddhism|Filipino Esoteric Buddhism]] †

* [[Gateway of the Hidden Flower]]

* [[Shambhala Buddhism]]
* [[True Awakening Tradition]]

* [[Mahasiddha]]
* [[Sahaja]]

* [[Kalachakra]]

* [[Generation stage]] * [[Completion stage]]
* [[Phowa]] * [[Tukdam]]
'''[[Tantra techniques (Vajrayana)|Tantric techniques]]:'''
<small>'''Fourfold division:'''</small>
* [[Classes of Tantra in Tibetan Buddhism#Kriyā|Kriyayoga]]
* [[Charyayoga]]
* [[Yogatantra]]
* [[Anuttarayogatantra]]
<small>'''Twofold division:'''</small>
* [[Inner Tantras]]
* [[Outer Tantras]]
'''Thought forms and visualisation:'''
* [[Mandala]]
* [[Mantra]]
* [[Mudra]]
* [[Thangka]]
* [[Yantra]]
'''[[Yoga]]:'''
* [[Ngöndro|Ngöndro]]
* [[Guru yoga|Guru yoga]]
* [[Deity yoga|Deity yoga]]
* [[Six Dharmas of Naropa|Six yogas]]:
* [[Tummo|Inner heat]]
* [[Luminosity (Vajrayana)|Luminosity yoga]]
* [[Dream yoga|Dream yoga]]
* [[Bardo|Death yoga]]
* [[Karmamudrā|Sex yoga]]
| list6title = Festivals | list6 =
* [[Ganachakra]] * [[Ghost Festival|Ullambana Puja]] | list7title = Tantric texts | list7 =
* [[Anuttarayoga Tantra]]
* [[Cakrasaṃvara Tantra]]
* [[Guhyagarbha Tantra]]
* [[Kulayarāja Tantra]]
* [[Mahāmāyā Tantra]]
* [[Mañjuśrī-mūla-kalpa]]
* [[Mañjuśrīnāmasamgīti]]
* [[Tattvasaṃgraha Tantra]]
* [[Vajrasekhara Sutra]]
* [[Yuthok Nyingthig]]
| list8title = Symbols and tools | list8 =
* [[Damaru]] * [[Ghanta]] * [[Melong]]
* [[Phurba]] * [[Vajra]] * [[Yab-Yum]]
| list9title = Ordination and transmission | list9 =
* [[Esoteric transmission]]
* [[Pointing-out instruction]]
* [[Samaya]] * [[Vajracharya]]
| below = }}<noinclude>{{documentation|content = [[Category:Buddhism sidebar templates‎|Vajrayana]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
